title: bellucia grossularioides
intro: Bellucia grossularioides, also known as the false box, is a plant species that belongs to the family Melastomataceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bellucia grossularioides include treating various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction to utilize its medicinal properties, and is also used in folk remedies.
